core_mechanism: mutual (instantaneous bidirectional) coupling of two dynamical oscillators driving a transition to phase/frequency synchronization once the mismatch in their intrinsic parameters falls below a threshold
brief_reason: The abstract reports two bidirectionally coupled pendulums that abruptly begin moving in synchrony when their lengths are sufficiently close, with instantaneous bidirectional coupling named as the prerequisite — the signature of a coupling-induced synchronization transition between oscillators.
